mapper.sql: report_id, user_id, exam_id, status, free_summary, premium_detail, analysis_error_code, retry_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ai_analysis_reports WHERE exam_id = #{examId} ORDER BY report_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM ai_analysis_reports WHERE exam_id = #{examId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY report_id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

SELECT
FROM ai_analysis_reports WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY report_id DESC

SELECT
FROM ai_analysis_reports ORDER BY report_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_analysis_reports ( user_id, exam_id, status, free_summary, premium_detail, analysis_error_code, retry_count ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{examId}, #{status}, #{freeSummary}, CAST(#{premiumDetail} AS JSON), #{analysisErrorCode}, #{retryCount} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_analysis_reports SET user_id = #{userId}, exam_id = #{examId}, status = #{status}, free_summary = #{freeSummary}, premium_detail = CAST(#{premiumDetail} AS JSON), analysis_error_code = #{analysisErrorCode}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE report_id = #{reportId}
